Package index

Bayesian Estimation

Functions for Bayesian estimation.

Conjugate Priors

Functions for conjugate priors.

inz_dNIG()
Normal-Inverse-Gamma Distribution for Prior and Posterior
inz_dbeta()
Beta Distribution for Prior and Posterior
inz_ddir()
Dirichlet Distribution for Prior and Posterior
inz_lbinom()
Construct a Likelihood Object for Binomial Data
inz_lmulti()
Construct a Likelihood Object for Multinomial Data
inz_lnorm()
Construct a Likelihood Object for Normal Data
calculate_posterior()
Calculate the Posterior Distribution

Other

Other functions, work in progress.

calc()
Calculate statistics
estimate_lm()
Estimate a linear regression model
estimate_mean()
Estimate the sample mean
estimate_proportions()
Exact posterior for proportions of one categorical variable
gibbs_anova()
Gibbs sampler for one-way ANOVA
gibbs_lm()
Gibbs Sample for Linear Regression
gibbs_lm_R()
Gibbs sampler for linear regression
gibbs_mean()
Gibbs Sample for Single Mean and Variance
print(<inzposterior>) summary(<inzposterior>) summary(<inzexact>) print(<inzexactsummary>) plot(<inzposterior>) plot(<inzexact>) mean(<inzposterior>)
iNZight Posterior Object
summary(<inz_dbeta>) summary(<inz_ddir>) summary(<inz_dNIG>) summary(<inz_dNIG_reg>)
Posterior Object Summary

rdirichlet()
